questions.text: Islam is a complete:
questions.subject: Pakistan Studies

options.explanation: Islam is considered a complete code of life because it provides guidance for every aspect of a person's life. It covers religious practices like prayer and fasting, as well as moral values such as honesty and compassion. Islam also addresses social and economic matters, promoting fairness and justice. It offers a comprehensive framework for individuals to lead a fulfilling and righteous life in all areas, be it personal, social, or societal.

questions.text: How many ordnance factories were working in
questions.subject: Pakistan Studies

options.explanation: In the Indian subcontinent, there are a total of 14 ordnance factories that are currently operational. These factories play a crucial role in the production of defense equipment and ammunition for the armed forces. They contribute significantly to the defense capabilities of the countries in the region.

questions.text: First charter of Human Rights is:
questions.subject: Pakistan Studies

options.explanation: The first charter of human rights with an international character is the Universal Declaration of Human Rights (UDHR). It was adopted by the United Nations General Assembly in 1948. The UDHR outlines fundamental rights and freedoms that should be universally protected and respected for all individuals, regardless of their nationality, ethnicity, gender, religion, or any other status. It serves as a guiding document for human rights standards and has been influential in shaping subsequent international human rights treaties and conventions.

questions.text: Abdul Rehman Chughtai is attached with the art of:
questions.subject: Pakistan Studies

options.explanation: Abdul Rehman Chughtai is attached with the art of painting. He was a renowned Pakistani artist known for his contributions to the world of painting. Chughtai's style was heavily influenced by Mughal and Persian miniature painting, and he is celebrated for his intricate and detailed work. His paintings often depicted cultural and historical themes, showcasing the beauty and richness of Pakistani art. Chughtai's artistic legacy continues to inspire and captivate art enthusiasts around the world.

questions.text: The language in which first translation of the Holy Quran was made:
questions.subject: Pakistan Studies

options.explanation: The first translation of the Holy Quran was made in the Arabic language. Arabic is the original language in which the Quran was revealed to Prophet Muhammad (peace be upon him). However, there have been subsequent translations of the Quran into various languages to make it accessible to people around the world.

questions.text: The meaning of integration is:
questions.subject: Pakistan Studies

options.explanation: Integration refers to the process of bringing different individuals, groups, or entities together to form a cohesive whole. It involves merging or combining separate parts into a unified entity.
Integration does not specifically mean having power. Power can be a result or consequence of integration in certain contexts, but it is not the primary definition of integration itself.
Integration does not directly relate to having an office. The concept of having an office typically refers to holding a position or role within an organization or institution.

questions.explanation: Integration does not directly relate to having an office. The concept of having an office typically refers to holding a position or role within an organization or institution.

questions.text: Commerce through internet is called:
questions.subject: Pakistan Studies

options.explanation: Commerce through the internet is commonly referred to as e-commerce. It involves buying and selling goods or services online, using electronic platforms and digital transactions. E-commerce has become increasingly popular and convenient, allowing people to shop from the comfort of their homes and access a wide range of products and services from around the world.

questions.text: The Punjab Government passed the Protection of Women Violence Act in:
questions.subject: Pakistan Studies

options.explanation: The Punjab Government passed the Protection of Women Violence Act in 2016. This act is aimed at providing legal protection and support to women who are victims of violence, including domestic violence, harassment, and other forms of abuse. It is an important step towards ensuring the safety and well-being of women in Punjab.

questions.text: The silk-route of Karakoram between China and Pakistan completed in:
questions.subject: Pakistan Studies

options.explanation: The Silk Route of Karakoram between China and Pakistan was completed in 1979. This historic trade route, also known as the Karakoram Highway, connects the two countries and serves as an important link for trade and cultural exchange. It is a breathtaking road that offers stunning views of the Karakoram mountain range and is considered one of the world's highest paved international roads.
